titleStmt.title: SII 23.97: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 97. (A.R. No. 97 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Nāgēśvaram-Uḍaiyār temple—on the south wall of the Goddess shrine Jat. Kulaśēkhara I: year 9+4(?)

summary.p: This is an inscription of Jaṭāvarman Kulaśēkhara I (A.D. 1190-1217) beginning with introduction Pūvin kiḻatti etc., and is dated in the 9th year and 1430th day of his reign i.e. the same day as in No. 91 above. It is stated that while the king was camping at Kaḷakkuḍi a representation was made by (minister) Aiyaṉ Kāliṅgarāyar asking for the remission of taxes on 5(1/2) mā of land at Elivāram with its boundaries specified, which had been purchased by the temple of Nālāyira Īśvaramuḍaiyār at Kallaḍaikkuṟichchi from the assembly of Rājarājachaturvēdimaṅgalam in Muḷḷi-nāḍu as recorded in No. 97 (a) below. On this he was pleased to order that it may be so entered as dēvadānaiṟaiyili inclusive of antarāyam in the tax register of the State, and engraved both on stone and copper. The next stage of the transaction follows in the same inscription prefaced by the king's title Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ (as observed in No. 91 above) in which he orders his kēḻvi and the uḷvari document of tax-free lands signed by his (Revenue) officers to be issued to the temple (for record). Their names as given at the end are (1) Śrīvallavaṉ Śrī Kayilāyamuḍaiyāṉ alias Tyāgābharaṇa-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Veḷiyāṟṟūr in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vālanāḍu, (2) Amudanambi alias Paḻanāṭṭaraiyaṉ the headman (Araiyaṉ) of Uḻakkuḍi in Kāna-nāḍu of Madurōdaya-vaḷanāḍu and (3) Āditadēvaṉ alias Pallavarāyaṉ of Perumaṇalūr in Aṇḍa-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūviṉ kiḻatti mevi viṟṟiruppa metiṉimātu nitiyiṟ puṇara vayappormaṭantai jayappuyattiruppa mākkalaimaṭantai vākkiṉil viḷaṅka ticaiyirunāṉkumicai nilā vaḷara maṉuneṟi tikaḻa Aṟaneṟic camaiyaṅkaḷāṟun taḻaippak kāṉaveṅkaiyai vil turantu miṉaṅ kaṉakācaṉattil viṟṟiruppa Eṇkiri cūḻnta Eḻukaṭaleḻu poḻil veṇ kuṭai niḻalkiḻ ceṅkol naṭappa koṭuṅkali naṭuṅki vempilat toḷippa villavar cempiyar virāṭavarā
ṭar pallavar tiṟaiyuṭaṉ muṟaimuṟai paṇiya Irunemiyaḷavu morunemi Oṅka Iṉṉamutākiya Iyalicai nāṭaka maṉṉivaḷara maṇimuṭi cūṭi veṟ peṉa voṅka viraciṅkācaṉattuk kaṟpakaniḻaṟkiṭ kalaivallor pukaḻa maṉṉavar teviyar vaṇaṅki niṉṟettu maṉṉa meṉṉaṭaiyavaṉi muḻu tuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrīkoccaṭaivaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 9 nāḷ 100 4 10 30
ṉāl kaḷakkuṭiyil Eḻuntaruḷi Irukka niṉaippu . muḷḷināṭṭu Irāja rājaccaturvetimaṅkalattut teṉpiṭākai kallaṭaikkuṟicci nālāyira Īcuramuṭaiyārkkut tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Antarāyam Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉam Iṟaiyiliyāka Ivvūr sabhaiyār pakkal Ittevar civanāmattāl Ivvūrt teṉpiṭākai Elivārattu vilaikoṇṭa nilam kāle Araimāvukkum vilaiyolaippaṭi kiḻellai parañcotipperumpilāṟṟukku me
ṟkum Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Aṟutimelvarampukku meṟkum teṉṉellai Oruppili pāṟaikkuḷattukku nirpāykiṟa kālukku vaṭakkum melellai muṉpu tiruniṟṟuccoḻac cilaiceṭṭi vārattukku Uḻutu varukiṟa vayak kal kiḻvarampu teṉmaṭalvarampukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai cāttaṉūrk kālukkut teṟkum Āka Innāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilam kāle Araimāvum Oṉpatāvatiṉetir nālāmāṇṭumutal Antarāyam Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu Aiyyaṉ
kāliṅkarāyar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ittevaṟkut tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷ ḷiṭṭuveṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Antarāyam Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyi liyāka Ivvūr sabhaiyārpakkal Ivvūrt teṉpiṭākai Elivārattu vilaikoḷ nilam kāle Arai māvum Oṉpatāvatiṉetir nālāmāṇṭu mutal Antarāyam Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭukaveṉṟum Ippaṭi cantirātittapakal celvatākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭi vittuk koḷkaveṉṟum tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭikku Ivai nan
tipaṉmaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkum tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ koneriṉmai koṇṭāṉ muḷḷināṭṭu Irājarājaccaturvetimaṅkalattut teṉ piṭākai kallaṭaikkuṟicciyil nālāyira Īśvaramuṭaiyārkkut tiruppaṭi māṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Antarāyam Uṭpaṭa teva tāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Ivvūr sapaiyārpakkal Ittevar civanāmattāl Ivvūrt teṉpiṭākai Elivārattu vilaikoṇṭa nilam kāle Arai māvukkum vilaiyolaippaṭi kiḻel
lai parañcotip perumpilāṟṟukku meṟku Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Aṟuti melvarampukku meṟku teṉellai Oruppilipāṟaikkuḷattukku nirpāy kiṟa kālukku vaṭakkum melellai muṉpu tiruniṟṟuccoḻac cilaiceṭṭi vārattukku Uḻutu varukiṟa vayakkal kiḻvarampu teṉvaṭal varampukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai cāttaṉūrk kālukkut teṟku Āka Innāṉ kellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilam kāle Araimāvum Oṉpatāvatiṉ Etir nālāmāṇṭumutal Antarāyam Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili
yāka Iṭuka naṅkeḻviyum variyilār Eḻutiṭṭa Uḷvariyum taraccoṉṉom Ippaṭi cantirātittapakaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭu vittukkoḷka . Ivai keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu veḷiyāṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ śrīvallavaṉ śrīkayilāyamuṭaiyāṉāṉa tiyākāparaṇamuventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 9vatu nāḷ 1000 4 100 3 10 8- ṉāl Ivai maturotayavaḷa nāṭṭuk kāṉaṉāṭṭirukkai Uḻakkuṭi Araiyaṉamuta nampiyāṉa paḻa nāṭṭaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
Aṇṭanāṭṭup perumaṇalūr pakavati Ātitatevaṉāṉa pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 23.97 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
